content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(expiry check to allow 30s clock-skew grace without changing success path)
C: preserve backward compatibility ∧ preserve security ∧ smallest possible diff ∧ one regression test
H: add a 30s grace window to the exp comparison only
P: if (expMs + 30000 < nowMs) → return res.status(401).json({ error: 'expired_token' })
V: boundary tokens within 30s no longer 401 ∧ tokens older than 30s still 401
R: ! exact-expiry and +30s skew regression test
A: test("accepts token expiring at boundary within 30s skew", async () => { /* mock Date.now, verifyJwt; exp = now/1000; expect next() and no 401 */ })
